mapper.select:
SELECT id, role_name, role_code, role_desc, sort_order, status, created_at, updated_at FROM roles WHERE deleted = 0
AND role_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{roleName}, '%')
AND role_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{roleCode}, '%')
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY sort_order ASC, created_at DESC

SELECT r.id, r.role_name, r.role_code, r.role_desc, r.sort_order, r.status, r.created_at, r.updated_at FROM roles r INNER JOIN user_roles ur ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE r.deleted = 0 AND r.status = 1 AND ur.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY r.sort_order ASC
SELECT id, role_name, role_code, role_desc, sort_order, status, created_at, updated_at FROM roles WHERE role_code = #{roleCode} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
